fault_hypothesis: On line 69, the average is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series has fewer elements than `window`, this produces an incorrect (smaller) result because it divides by a larger denominator than the actual number of samples.

constraints.intent: After computing avg, it should equal total divided by the actual tail length, not by window.
avg times the actual number of tail samples must equal total; dividing by window breaks this when len(tail) < window.
Before avg is returned or logged, it must equal the mean of the actual tail samples.
When warmup is met and a value is returned, it must be the true mean of the tail samples.
